name: roku-graphify
description: BrightScript code graph analysis tool powered by tree-sitter

scripts.build-grammar: cd grammars/brightscript && npx tree-sitter generate && npx node-gyp configure && npx node-gyp build
scripts.test: node src/cli/analyze-file.js examples/demo.brs --format json && node -e "require('./src/app/graphify')" && node test/source-map-resolution.test.mjs && echo 'All checks passed'
